title: Heston Blumenthal Precision by Salter Digital Dual Platform Digital Kitchen Scale – Cooking & Baking, 200g & 10kg Capacity, Add & Weigh Tare Function, Weigh Food, Coffee, Yeast, Liquids
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Precision with a large platform, the Dual Platform Precision Scale from Heston Blumenthal by Salter is perfect for every kitchen.
Boasting 2 platforms, the larger has a max capacity of 10 kg with 1 g increments, the smaller precise scale has 200g capacity in 0.1g.
Featuring an add and weigh with ‘zero’ function, easily measure multiple ingredients into the same bowl whilst saving on washing up
A perfect substitute to a measuring jug, the aquatronic feature accurately measures liquids and fluids in imperial/metric to suit you.
Large and clear, the backlit display on this fantastic scale is easy to read and the slim design enables for easy storage after using.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Auto Shut Off, High Weight Capacity, Lightweight, Precision Balanced, Tare Function
